name: Breakfast Fruit Chimichangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Apricot Basting Sauce according to Step 2.
2. Prepare the Cream Cheese mixture: Combine cream cheese, ricotta cheese, sugar, and orange peel; mix well.
3. Warm the flour tortillas on a clean surface until they are soft and warm.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over one side of each tortilla.
5. Place 1/4 cup of apricot preserves onto each tortilla.
6. Add 1 beaten egg to each tortilla, followed by 2 tablespoons of softened margarine or butter.
7. Top with sliced apricots.
8. Fold the sides and roll up tightly to create chimichangas.
9. Turn off heat source when finished cooking.
